summary: Unusual spike in error rates and response times observed across various services. The incident primarily affected the user authentication and payment processing microservices.

anomaly_findings.description: Error rate for authentication service exceeded normal threshold.
Average response time for payment processing service significantly increased.

error_patterns.description: Internal Server Error in authentication service.
Service Unavailable error for payment processing service.

candidate_root_cause_hypotheses: Database timeout leading to 500 Internal Server Errors.
Increased load on services due to promotional activity causing 503 errors.
